title: Satya 01478 Rainforest Incense Sticks, 12 Packs x 15g
features: Satya Oriental Range Contains 12 Packs x 15gm Of Incense Sticks
The Satya Oriental Range Collection is one of the most famous brands of incense in the world and is traditionally made from a sandalwood base to which are added a variety of oils

Perfect for everyday use Worshipping, Church, Wedding, events, aromatherapy,Spa, Reiki, Meditation , Healing,Yoga , Sensual Therapy, Positivity and Relaxation. Our Incenses give you a feeling of compassion, well-being, inner peace, relaxation, increased vitality and embodiment
Each 15gm pack contains around 12 - 16 incense sticks (determined by weight)
Manufactured by Shrinivas Sugandhalaya LLP, Mumbai, the company originally owned by the founder, Late K. N. S. Setty
description: Product Description The world famous brand name Satya and the brand leader SATYA SAI BABA NAG CHAMPA available in unique packaging need not require any introduction and is probably the highest exported Incense from India. The legacy and heritage that K. S. Nagaraj Setty inherited from his father, Late K. N. S. Setty are the resource used to create amazing formulations bringing us some of the best incense fragrances available. The Satya branded products available in the market are the innovation of Mr. Setty. Even with the availability of advanced technology, the TRADITIONAL HAND ROLLED method still is being used in production to continue the inheritance and traditions of the founder. The corporate office of Shrinivas Sugandhalaya LLP, is located in Mumbai as well as a manufacturing facility producing for the domestic market. Two production units in Bangalore are utilized to exclusively produce and supplying HAND ROLLED Incense to International market. Shrinivas Sugandhalaya LLP, Mumbai will soon start operating from a third unit Bangalore which is likely to be one of the largest the city has seen. Shrinivas Sugandhalaya LLP, Mumbai employees around 2000 team members, to help meet the ever increasing demand for the Satya brand. It must be noted that to attain the envisaged growth, due attention is duly applied to the manufacturing process by upholding the morality and commitment to society. Shrinivas Sugandhalaya LLP, Mumbai maintains a CSR policy which covers Women Empowerment, Clean and Green Environment, Attention on Physically Challenged Persons, Concern on Orphans and Old Aged, Welfare of Employees and many more. As a sincere effort for to encourage Women Empowerment, Shrinivas Sugandhalaya LLP, Mumbai employ women in all area of operation including key posts. More than 80% of their work force is women. In conclusion, it must be note that the success of Shrinivas Sugandhalaya LLP, Mumbai is indebted to the founder, current owner, the employees and most of all, to the loyal consumer it serves. Safety Warning Please read all product packaging literature and product labels before use.
